markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore a partnership for AI visibility and brand mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Noble helps brands get mentioned in LLM sources** (e.g., publishers, other brands) for mid-funnel category searches (e.g., "best B2B marketing agencies").](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**GrowthX's new "Check That" index** (6k+ brands) is a major opportunity, offering both a high-quality publisher network for Noble and a direct use case for GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [**A partnership would be multi-faceted:** GrowthX uses Noble for its own initiatives and clients, while Noble gains access to GrowthX's massive publisher inventory.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: LLM Visibility for Brands

  - [LLMs are now a top priority for marketers, with CEOs and boards focusing on their teams' ability to drive visibility.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Key Challenge:** Brands need to appear in mid-funnel, category-level searches (e.g., "best expense management tools"), but LLMs rarely cite brand websites for these queries.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [**Solution:** Get mentioned in the third-party sources (publishers, other brands) that LLMs *do* cite.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [**Why Mentions \> Backlinks:**](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [LLMs value the copy and context of a mention, not just the link.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
      - [LLM updates are fast (days/weeks), providing immediate impact, unlike the slow (months/quarters) effect of traditional SEO.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)

### Noble's Solution: An Automated Mention Marketplace

  - [**Core Strategy:** Automate brand mention placement at scale.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=518.0)
  - [**Traction:** Launched in Sept; now has \~50 brands (Ramp, Webflow, Zendesk) and is moving upmarket (Adobe, Dell).](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [**Publisher Network:**](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=772.0)
      - [**Quality Control:** Noble only targets sources already cited by LLMs for relevant prompts, ensuring high-value placements.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=821.0)
      - [**Recruitment:** Cold email outreach yields an 8–10% reply rate, with \~50% converting to mentions.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=904.0)
      - [**Monetization:** Publishers are either paid or receive reciprocal mentions from Noble's brand network.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=953.0)
  - [**Future Vision:** A two-sided marketplace where brands and publishers manage offers in a dashboard, replacing cold email.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1127.0)
      - [**Pricing Model:** An auction system will price mentions based on demand from competing brands.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)

### Agency Partnership Models

  - [**GrowthX's Concern:** Backlink services have poor margins for agencies (e.g., a $500 cost marked up to $1k is only 50% margin).](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1332.0)
  - [**Noble's Proposed Models:**](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1397.0)
    1.  [**Cost Pass-Through:** Bundle Noble's service into a client package to improve overall results and stickiness.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
    2.  [**Upsell:** Mark up Noble's cost (e.g., $200 cost → $400 client price) to generate direct margin.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1465.0)
    3.  [**Referral:** Earn a pure-margin fee for introducing clients to Noble.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)

### GrowthX's "Check That" Initiative

  - [**Product:** A new, free open index for AI visibility, launching in a few weeks.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [**Scale:** Already includes 6,000+ brands with pages that are gaining LLM citations (e.g., a page for "Mentally Fine pricing" is already cited).](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
  - [**Business Model:** A loss leader (costs GrowthX hundreds of thousands/mo) to corner the market on AI visibility data, with revenue from custom tracking and data licensing (e.g., to Webflow).](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1777.0)
  - [**Strategic Fit:**](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
      - [**As a Customer:** GrowthX can use Noble to get its own content and client pages mentioned in LLMs.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
      - [**As a Publisher:** GrowthX's 6,000+ brand pages provide a massive, high-quality inventory of "reverse mentions" for Noble's marketplace.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Rahul:** Send Noble's partnership details to Marcel.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1851.0)
  - [**Marcel:** Introduce Rahul to Jason Gong (GrowthX VP of Marketing) to discuss a pilot program.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1920.0)
  - [**Pilot Program:**](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
      - [**Use Case:** Increase LLM visibility for GrowthX's "Check That" initiative.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1943.0)
      - [**Scope:** Potentially include a few specific client campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1535.0)
      - [**Publisher Role:** Explore using GrowthX's 6,000+ brand pages as mention inventory for Noble's marketplace.](https://fathom.video/share/hGL5WdwoqWQuJZUxGsn7VxcR7XuQDq_k?tab=summary&timestamp=1877.0)
